texto: It's a strange experience, dying. People talk about how it creeps over you like a warm blanket. That's not true. It starts out warm, but then it hits you like a bucket of icy water after stepping out of a sweat lodge. Then it's all black like a void. I would know. I died and lived to tell about it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Morgan Chalfant: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “It's a strange experience, dying. People talk about how it creeps over you like a warm blanket. T…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, death-and-dying, life-and-living pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e life-and-living.
